title: Avalon Cobblemon Oficial
description: Pack with Cobblemon and some Perfomance Mods - The server Included in the pack has PokeLoot, Mega Evolutions, Legendary Forge System, BattleTower, Legendary Encounters, Shiny and Hidden Chains, Z-Moves and more!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8854372aeeed2e984723c3e5a9d79cebb7d0a08.png)
An exciting Cobblemon Modpack with server included - Solo & Multiplayer

![Logo bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15740a4cc9976d94547cccddc430886ac899855d.png)
Have you ever imagined playing Pokémon within Minecraft with thousands of other players?
The modpack features the Cobblemon Mod with several QOL Mods to provide better game quality
We present you Avalon Cobblemon, the mix of the best server, with the best mod

![Logobar2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15740a4cc9976d94547cccddc430886ac899855d.png)
Mods List

  • Cobblemon
  • Cobblemon UI Tweaks
  • More Cobblemon Tweaks
  • Xaero's MiniMap & World Map
  • Zoomify
  • Balm
  • No Shade
  • Default Options
  • Cloth Config
  • JEI ![logobar3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15740a4cc9976d94547cccddc430886ac899855d.png)
    Mod Loader

    A modpack & server hosted on Fabric Loader,the best mod loader today, with performance improvements and a sustainable ecosystem, with its upgrades it is considered the best loader today, surpassing even Forge
